full_text:
Kong Li (Deyuan) еӯ”зҰ® (еҫ·йҒ )
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Li (еӯ”зҰ®), styledDeyuan (еҫ·йҒ ). Spoke stridently about the costs of building palaces to Cao Rui. Kong Li was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
